events.title: BTN Jakarta International Marathon 2026
events.description: The premium international marathon running through the main landmarks of Jakarta, offering Full Marathon, Half Marathon, and 10K categories.

events.title: Borobudur Marathon 2026
events.description: Run through cultural heritage and scenic local villages around the majestic Borobudur Temple, experiencing deep local hospitality.

events.title: Semarang 10k 2026
events.description: A nostalgic running journey exploring the historical Old Town (Kota Lama) of Semarang with unique culinary and cultural spots along the route.

events.title: Bandung Trail Run 2026
events.description: A challenging yet beautiful off-road trail running event amidst the pine forests and refreshing mountains of Dago Pakar Bandung.

events.title: Bali Sunset Half Marathon 2026
events.description: Run with the spectacular sunset view starting and finishing around the iconic GWK Cultural Park, with sea-breeze refreshing your path.
